entity.country_or_origin: Abstract, Ink, Zero Network, Shape, and Redstone ecosystems
entity.summary: Multichain EVM decentralized exchange operating Uniswap V2-style automated-market-maker pools and Uniswap V3-style concentrated-liquidity pools across several emerging networks.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates SakuraSwap AMM, CLMM, pool, explore, and network-specific deployment surfaces into one exchange entity. No exact launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: SakuraSwap official trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes token trading, pool management, exploration, and deployed-contract surfaces and identifies the venue as powered by Uniswap V3.

evidence.title: SakuraSwap protocol metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current TVL, fees, and non-zero 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume across Abstract, Ink, Zero Network, and related deployments, supporting active classification.
